name: Spiced Whitebait- Jeot Khal
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Whitebait or Other Very Tiny Whole Fish
1 tbsp White Sesame Seeds, Finely Ground
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the fish and dry thoroughly.
2. Beat the egg whites in a bowl.
3. Blend in the salt, finely ground sesame seeds, and chili powder until well combined.
4. Heat oil to moderately hot in a deep fryer or heavy-based saucepan.
5. Dip each piece of fish into the egg white mixture, ensuring it is fully coated.
6. Carefully drop the fish into the hot oil and deep-fry until golden brown and crisp. Use tongs or a slotted spoon to turn the fish occasionally for even cooking.
7. Lift the fish out with a spoon and drain well on paper towels.
8. Store the fried fish, when cool, in an airtight container.
9. Just before serving, heat sesame oil to very hot in a wide skillet.
10. Add the fried fish to the skillet and stir-fry until heated through and crisp again. Adjust heat if necessary to prevent burning.
11. Serve immediately while hot.
